mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO notifications (notification_id, `user`, `timestamp`, object_type, object_id, subject, message, dedup_key) VALUES (#{notificationId}, #{user}, #{timestamp}, #{objectType}, #{objectId}, #{subject}, #{message}, #{dedupKey})
mapper.select: SELECT notification_id AS notificationId, `user`, `timestamp`, object_type AS objectType, object_id AS objectId, subject, message, read_at AS readAt FROM notifications WHERE `user` = #{user} AND read_at IS NULL ORDER BY `timestamp` DESC, notification_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE `user` = #{user} AND read_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO file_subscriptions (file_id, user_id, created_at) VALUES (#{fileId}, #{userId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM file_subscriptions WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM file_subscriptions WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_outbox (notification_id, user_id, channel, payload, status, retry_count, retry_after, created_at) VALUES (#{notificationId}, #{userId}, #{channel}, #{payload}, 'PENDING', 0, #{retryAfter}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_outbox SET status = 'PENDING', retry_count = #{retryCount}, retry_after = #{retryAfter}, last_error = #{lastError}, locked_by = NULL, locked_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, channel, status, retry_count AS retryCount, payload, created_at AS createdAt, sent_at AS sentAt FROM notification_outbox ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
